parsed_review.summary: Claude Code Opus 4.8 max read-only review reported no P0 or P1 findings. It found the tenant-scope slice correct, in scope, fail-closed, and well covered. One P2 closeout-ordering finding is resolved by writing this review evidence and rerunning final RP00 validation before commit.

findings.title: Forward-referenced review evidence already asserted passed
findings.disposition: This file records the actual single Claude CLI review session, verdict, findings, and adjudication before final RP00 validation is rerun. The final gate must pass after these evidence files exist.

findings.title: Unverified cross-subphase symbols
findings.disposition: Verified locally. expectedStateEnumRegistryId and fixtureStateEnumRegistryIdentifier are defined in the S02 validator block before the S03 block references them.

findings.title: Context leniency is asymmetric by design
findings.disposition: Accepted as intentional and consistent with M06.S03. Stored tenant_id remains exact and canonical, while caller context is normalized before same-tenant comparison.

findings.title: startsWith stable-prefix check is redundant with anchored regex
findings.disposition: Retained for clearer fail-closed prefix diagnostics, matching sibling identifier and tenant helpers.
